$schema: Palette definitions for the Inky displays Inky Studio supports.
$source: Spectra 6 RGB values measured against an sRGB monitor by Mehdi (calibration from inky-photo-frame v2.0).

spectra_palette.description: Calibrated 6-color palette used by both the 7.3" 2025 and 13.3" 2025 Inky displays (chip ac073tc1a).

pimoroni.description: Pimoroni library defaults — relies on the inky library's internal palette, no client-side processing. Use as a reference when COLOR_MODE='pimoroni'.

warmth_boost.description: Aggressive warmth adjustments before applying spectra_palette. Best for portraits and skin tones.
